case_title: MAN SZE LUI et al VS. JULIAN YAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUI, MAN SZE ZHANG, ZHI QING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YAN, JULIAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $114.14 FILED BY LUI, MAN SZE ZHANG, ZHI QING AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, JULIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED SEP-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, JULIAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---JOHN MAI. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-29-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---JOHN MAI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
